calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
CAROLYN CHAN, PLAINTIFF
JANET HUNG & DEBORA-ANNE TOM APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT 1366-1368 17TH AVE. HOA

The parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court rules in favor of the defendant.
All exhibits are returned to respective parties.
Court adjourns.

Judge Newton J. Lam, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported.

CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-11-18 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 303
